metadata.description: Deep Suite — eight plugins for structured development, knowledge wiki, autonomous experimentation, independent code review, document gardening, harness diagnostics, cross-project memory, and goal-driven execution across Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: deep-work
plugins.description: Evidence-Driven Development Protocol — a single-command Brainstorm → Research → Plan → Implement → Test → Integrate workflow with TDD enforcement, receipt-based evidence, and a hard separation between planning and coding, for Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-native knowledge wiki — ingest sources (files, URLs, notes, Obsidian vaults) into linked Markdown pages with source provenance, then query the accumulated knowledge; self-linting and self-healing, for Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: deep-evolve
plugins.description: Autonomous Experimentation Protocol — a measured outer loop that proposes, runs, and selects code changes against a fitness metric, with lineage and session history, for Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Independent Evaluator — reviews your changes in a separate agent context (Claude, with optional Codex review and adversarial passes) and returns an APPROVE / CONCERN / REQUEST_CHANGES verdict plus an evidence-based response protocol.

plugins.name: deep-docs
plugins.description: Document gardening agent — scans agent-instruction docs (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and friends) for drift against the code, auto-fixes the safe subset, and reports a freshness audit, for Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: deep-dashboard
plugins.description: Cross-plugin harness diagnostics + suite telemetry — aggregates receipts, health reports, and harnessability metrics emitted by sibling deep-suite plugins into one dashboard, with optional OTLP export.

plugins.name: deep-memory
plugins.description: Cross-project semantic memory — harvests sibling-plugin artifacts into reusable memory cards (rule-based plus LLM distillation) and surfaces task-specific briefs, with opt-in cross-runtime hook capture and multi-pass redaction.

plugins.name: deep-goal
plugins.description: Goal condition compiler — evaluates a long-running task, reshapes it to fit, scouts prerequisites, and compiles a ready-to-paste native /goal condition for Claude Code and Codex, with multi-plugin synergy recipes.
